narrative: US-Iran deal optimism drives a collapse in crude prices, lifting risk sentiment as equities firm and gold bids higher +2.81% near $4,230. USD/JPY tests the 160.11 intervention threshold, supported by a 286bp OIS carry advantage despite a moderate options put skew; equities +1.75%; DXY -0.11%; VIX 18.9. Watch the BoJ rate decision and RBA meeting on June 16 for the next G10 policy catalysts.
